title: AKEOS Daily Executive Brief
description: Canonical data contract produced by n8n and consumed by the AKEOS Command Center dashboard.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp for when n8n generated the brief. ISO 8601 is recommended.

todaySummary.description: Markdown-compatible daily summary. Lines beginning with #, ##, and - receive light dashboard formatting.

priorityEmails.description: High-priority email items. Currently used by the dashboard metric count.

followUps.description: Follow-up actions or people to contact.

priorities.description: Current priorities rendered in the dashboard.

recommendedAction.description: Single recommended next action shown in the Execution Readiness card.

time.description: Display time, for example 09:00 or TBD.

badge.description: Meeting classification, for example Critical, Strategic, Family, or Normal.

prep.description: Preparation note shown below the meeting title.

urgency.description: Urgency classification, for example High, Medium, or Low.

status.description: Status badge shown on the priority row, for example High or Medium.
